note: Iron function parameters use int64_t* for [Int] arrays with implicit array length parameters; C uses int* without length params. Language-design-inherent: Iron Int=int64_t (2x width), array slices pass length as extra parameter, recursive binary search amplifies per-call overhead. Stable observed ratio ~4.4x; threshold set to 5.5x (+20% margin on 4.4x worst-case).
